---
title: "CronologĂ­a"
---

```{r}
#| results: asis
source("R/site_helpers.R")

claims <- read_processed_table("claim_records.csv")
analysis_notes <- read_processed_table("analysis_notes.csv")
sources <- read_processed_table("source_records.csv")
candidates <- read_candidate_registry_public() |> dplyr::select(.data$candidate_id, .data$president_name)
taxonomy <- read_taxonomy_public() |> dplyr::select(.data$topic_id, topic_label = .data$label_public)

cat('<p class="section-intro">La cronologĂ­a resume hechos y propuestas con tema inferido y sĂ­ntesis sustantiva. No muestra filas vacĂ­as ni estados internos de ingesta.</p>')

if (nrow(claims) == 0) {
  emit_callout("TodavĂ­a no hay eventos pĂºblicos en la cronologĂ­a.", "note")
} else {
  claim_timeline <- claims |>
    dplyr::left_join(candidates, by = "candidate_id") |>
    dplyr::left_join(taxonomy, by = "topic_id") |>
    dplyr::mutate(topic_label = dplyr::coalesce(.data$topic_label, .data$topic_id, "Tema inferido")) |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(.data$event_date), .data$president_name) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 80)

  source_numbers <- source_number_lookup(sources)
  items <- vapply(seq_len(nrow(claim_timeline)), function(index) {
    row <- claim_timeline[index, , drop = FALSE]
    paste0(
      '<article class="timeline-item">',
      '<p class="timeline-item__date">', escape_html(format_public_date(row$event_date[[1]])), '</p>',
      '<h3>', escape_html(row$president_name[[1]] %||% row$candidate_id[[1]]), ' Â· ', escape_html(row$topic_label[[1]]), '</h3>',
      '<p class="narrative-paragraph">', escape_html(row$summary_text[[1]]), ' ', external_claim_reference_html(row, sources, source_numbers), '</p>',
      '</article>'
    )
  }, character(1))

  cat(paste0('<div class="timeline-list">', paste(items, collapse = ""), '</div>'))
}

cat('\n## Notas analĂ­ticas publicadas\n')

if (nrow(analysis_notes) == 0) {
  emit_callout("AĂºn no hay notas analĂ­ticas publicadas.", "note")
} else {
  notes <- analysis_notes |>
    dplyr::left_join(candidates, by = "candidate_id") |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(.data$confidence))

  items <- vapply(seq_len(nrow(notes)), function(index) {
    row <- notes[index, , drop = FALSE]
    paste0(
      '<article class="timeline-item timeline-item--analysis">',
      '<h3>', escape_html(row$president_name[[1]] %||% row$candidate_id[[1]]), ' Â· ', escape_html(analysis_type_label(row$analysis_type[[1]])), '</h3>',
      '<p class="narrative-paragraph">', escape_html(row$public_reasoning_summary[[1]]), '</p>',
      '<p class="comparison-card__meta">Confianza ', escape_html(confidence_public_label(row$confidence[[1]])), '.</p>',
      '</article>'
    )
  }, character(1))

  cat(paste0('<div class="timeline-list">', paste(items, collapse = ""), '</div>'))
}
```
